content.speakerText: Alright, I'll ring you up. Cash or card?
content.speakerTextCn: 好的，我给你结账。现金还是刷卡？
expectedAnswers: Card, please. Thank you so much for your help!
Cash. I really appreciate how quick you were!
I'll use my card — you've made this so easy!
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确说明付款方式（card/cash）
是否包含真诚的感谢语（如 thank you / appreciate）
表达是否自然流畅，符合口语习惯

content.speakerText: Here's your receipt and the drill. Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 这是收据和电钻，祝你今天愉快！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! You're amazing — see you next time!
Appreciate it! Have a good one too!
Thank you! I'll be back soon!
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了对方的祝福（如回应 'you too' 或 'see you'）
是否使用了情感性词汇（如 amazing, awesome, appreciate）
告别语是否自然，避免机械式 'bye' 或 'okay'
